title: Add flatten handling of pre-existing wires as created by interfaces

features.name: hierarchical_wire_with_keep_across_flatten
features.description: Code should include a wire with a dotted hierarchical name in a submodule that has a keep attribute and is accessed from the parent module via a hierarchical reference path

features.name: cross_module_hierarchical_wire_assignment
features.description: Code should include a parent module assigning to a wire that exists inside a child module instance using a hierarchical path reference like bar.internal

features.name: keep_wire_with_assignment_in_submodule
features.description: Code should include a wire inside a submodule that has both a keep attribute and an assignment expression using operators
